titleStmt.title: SII 39.177: original edition by K. Karuppiah

No. 177. (A.R. No. 177 of 1916.) TIRUPPUKKUḺI, CONJEEVERAM TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. VIJAYARĀGHAVA-PERUMĀḶ TEMPLE-ON THE SOUTH WALL TRIBHUVAṈACHAKRAVARTIN VIJAYAGAṆḌAGŌPĀLA DĒVA20TH YEAR (1270 A.D.)

summary.p: This inscription refers to the sarvamānya grant of a land in Dāmaṟkōṭṭam by Madhurāntaka pottappichchōḻaṉ Vijayagaṇḍagōpālaṉ for the supply of food offerings to the temple of Vijayarāghava Perumāḷ. Taxes like taṟiyirai, taṭṭārppāṭṭam, iṉavari and ērimīṉpāṭṭam are mentioned.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
puvaṉacakkaravattikaḷ śrī vicaiyakaṇṭakopāla tevaṟku yāṇṭu 2 10 Āvatu kaṟkaṭa nāyaṟṟu pū pa ṣattu tritiyaiyum caṉikkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa mulattu nāḷ maturāntaka
jeyaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattu tāmaṟkoṭṭattu tāmaṟ nāṭṭu tiruppati tiruppuṭkuḻi vicaiyarākavap perumāḷukku Amutupaṭi cāttuppaṭikkum palapaṇi nām nicayittu
makiḻpāṟkellai kūrattār Elaikkum ciṟuniṉṟaiyāl vaṭakku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai pokala muṭṭaiyākkattāṉ Ellaikku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai
vatayūrāṉa Ellaikkut teṟkum Iṉṉālpāṟkellaikku naṭuuṭpaṭṭa nirnilamum kollainilamum Ivvāṇṭai Āṭimātam mutal kaṭamaiyum Āyamum kācu kaṭa
mai taṟiyiṟai taṭṭārppāṭṭam Iṉavari Erimiṉpāṭṭam maṟṟu Epperppaṭṭa Aṉaittāyaṅkaḷum Uṭpaṭa sarvamānnyamāka cantirātittavarai celvatāka cilālekai
vicaiya kaṇṭa kopāla tevaṉeṉ §
Digital edition of SII 39.177 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
